image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Did you know short-wavelength light can trick your body into thinking it's daytime?
Context visual: This is blue light, a powerful signal for our circadian rhythms.
Escalation visual: Excessive exposure at night disrupts sleep, leading to a cascade of health issues.
Evidence visual: Studies show that late-night screens confuse our internal clocks.
Payoff visual: Limiting blue light before bed can restore your sleep cycle and improve overall health.
Cta visual: Want better sleep? Start managing your screen time wisely. Like and follow for more science insights!
